description_long: This is a rectangular, two-story house with a stone brick exterior and a flat roof. The front facade features a green door with a circular window, flanked by two large windows and a smaller window above the door. The side walls are mostly solid stone with a few windows, and the rear has a similar window arrangement to the front but without a door. The interior is partially visible, showing white walls, wooden floors, and some potted plants and furniture. The house sits on a green lawn base, suggesting a suburban or urban residential setting. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on symmetry and practicality.
description: A two-story stone brick house with a flat roof, green door, and symmetrical window arrangement, set on a green lawn. The interior features white walls, wood floors, and minimal furnishings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green door with a circular window, two large windows, and a smaller window above the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, with a large window and visible interior furnishings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a mostly solid stone wall, a single window, and a black horizontal feature.
description_view_3: Rear view with two windows, a visible interior room, and no entry door.
attribute_entryway_design: Central green door with a circular window, no steps or porch, flanked by large windows and a small window above.
